clone_gun.description: §f[Shift + R-Click]§7 Copies the targeted sub-level. If there's no target, clears the contained sub-level.
§f[R-Click]§7 Places a copy of the contained sub-level.
evil_ass_orb.description: §f[Hold R-Click]§7 Removes any targeted sub-level instantly.
camcorder.description: §f[R-Click]§7 Starts a recording of the targeted sub-level. If already recording, ends the recording.
tape.description: §f[R-Click]§7 Replays the contained recording to the targeted or tracked sub-level.
§f[Shift + R-Click]§7 Tracks the targeted sub-level. If there's no target, clear the tracked sub-level.
bubble_blower.description: §f[R-Click Block]§7 Sets the start of the assembly region. If clicked again, assembles all blocks in the region.
camera.description: §f[R-Click]§7 Opens a screen for selecting sub-levels to capture.
photo.description: §f[R-Click]§7 Restores all captured sub-levels to their positions in the snapshot.
crowbar.description: §f[Stack On Crowbar]§7 Combines the strengths of both Crowbars into one item.

block.touys.projector.description: §f[R-Click With Item]§7 Inserts the held Tape or Photo.
